items.title: Austrian climber found guilty after girlfriend froze to death on mountain
items.dek: The woman died of hypothermia during a climbing trip on the Grossglockner mountain in January 2025.
items.body: The woman died of hypothermia during a climbing trip on the Grossglockner mountain in January 2025.

items.title: More than 90 deaths this season: Are we seeing more avalanches?
items.dek: Recent deadly incidents in California and Europe are putting avalanches - and how to avoid them - in the spotlight.
items.body: Recent deadly incidents in California and Europe are putting avalanches - and how to avoid them - in the spotlight.
